Angular Snake Game

Build a Snake game on a fixed grid board with keyboard controls, food, score updates, and wall/self collision handling.

Score: {{ score }} Length: {{ length }} {{ statusLabel }}

Use Arrow keys or WASD to move. Space pauses, Enter resets after game over or a win.
